summary: Comprehensive testing of DOMMMA V2 real estate marketplace completed. All new features (Payments, Documents, Messages, Nova AI chatbot) working correctly. Backend: 100% (24/24 tests passed). Frontend: 100% of tested flows working.

issues: Minor hydration warning for span inside option/select elements (console warning only, doesn't affect functionality)

passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint working
Backend: Database seeding endpoint
Backend: Auth login (Renter/Landlord/Contractor roles)
Backend: Property listings API with filters (city, price, pet-friendly)
Backend: Stripe payment checkout creation - returns valid Stripe URL
Backend: Payment history retrieval
Backend: Document upload with base64 encoding
Backend: Document retrieval and filtering by type
Backend: Direct message sending between users
Backend: Message retrieval and conversation list
Backend: Nova AI chat with budget calculator queries
Backend: Nova AI chat with user context (lifestyle search)
Frontend: Homepage loads with Nova AI button visible
Frontend: Login flow with role selection (Renter/Landlord/Contractor)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with role-specific sidebar navigation
Frontend: Payments page loads with Quick Payment options (Monthly Rent, Security Deposit, Utilities)
Frontend: Payment modal opens with amount/description validation
Frontend: Documents page loads with stats (Total, Signed, Pending, Lease)
Frontend: Document upload modal with file selection and type dropdown
Frontend: Documents search and filter functionality
Frontend: Messages page shows demo contacts (John Smith, Sarah Johnson, Mike Wilson)
Frontend: Messages conversation selection and chat interface
Frontend: Message input and send button functionality
Frontend: Nova AI chatbot modal opens with welcome message
Frontend: Nova AI quick actions visible (Property Search, Financial Help, Application Help, Neighborhood)
Frontend: Nova AI budget calculator response with proactive suggestions
Frontend: Nova AI preferences panel (Monthly Budget, Occupation, Pets, Commute)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React useEffect dependencies warnings in Payments, Documents, Messages pages - recommend adding missing dependencies or using useCallback
Minor: Hydration warnings for span inside select/option elements - Emergent dev tools related, no functional impact
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing API endpoints and dynamic user creation on login
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V2 features are working: Stripe Payments creates valid checkout sessions, Documents supports upload/download/sign workflow, Messages has demo contacts for UI display (MOCKED), WebSocket endpoint exists for real-time messaging, Nova AI chatbot fully functional with budget calculator, lifestyle search, and preferences panel.

mocked_apis.Messages: Demo contacts (John Smith, Sarah Johnson, Mike Wilson) are hardcoded for UI display when no real conversations exist

Payments (Stripe).details: Quick payment options, payment modal, Stripe checkout URL generation

Documents.details: Upload modal, document stats, search, filter by type

Messages (WebSocket).details: Conversation list, message input, demo contacts visible

Nova AI Chatbot.details: Welcome message, quick actions, budget calculator, preferences panel, proactive suggestions

Dashboard Navigation.details: Sidebar links to Payments/Documents/Messages all functional
